items.body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.Compute.Batch` **Service directory:** `sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/` **Triggered by:** 3c44b0d9db750853a3bbeb839e1099dfacbb3d36 (PR #56264) by `@wiboris` ## What Changed PR #56264 promoted `Azure.Compute.Batch` to GA (1.0.0). It updated the README, CHANGELOG, and MigrationGuide as part of the release, but introduced or left several documentation issues. ## Gaps Found - **Broken NuGet package link** in the README header badge row: the link reads `(www.nuget.org/redacted) with no package path, so it lands on the NuGet homepage rather than the `Azure.Compute.Batch` package page - **Malformed "Next steps" section**: the section body reads `View more https://github.com/.../samples here for common usages ... [Batch Samples]((redacted))` ŌĆö a raw URL appears inline in the text alongside a separate hyperlink, making the sentence awkward and redundant - **Sparse GA CHANGELOG entry**: the `1.0.0 (2026-03-01)` section contains only "GA release, see migration guide if migrating from Microsoft.Azure.Batch" ŌĆö it should include a brief summary of what changed from 1.0.0-beta.5 to GA so users can understand the release at a glance
­¤ōÉ Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files #### File 1: `sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/README.md` ŌĆö Edit **Fix 1 ŌĆö NuGet link** (near top of file, in the badge/links row): Replace: ```markdown [Package (NuGet)]((www.nuget.org/redacted) ``` With: ```markdown [Package (NuGet)]((www.nuget.org/redacted) ``` **Fix 2 ŌĆö Next Steps section** (near the bottom of the file): Replace: ```markdown ## Next steps View more https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/samples here for common usages of the Batch client library: [Batch Samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/samples). ``` With: ```markdown ## Next steps View more common usages of the Batch client library in the [Batch Samples](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/samples) folder. ``` #### File 2: `sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/CHANGELOG.md` ŌĆö Edit Replace the sparse GA entry: ```markdown ## 1.0.0 (2026-03-01) ### Other Changes GA release, see migration guide if migrating from Microsoft.Azure.Batch ``` With a richer summary that reflects what this release represents: ```markdown ## 1.0.0 (2026-03-01) ### Features Added - General Availability (GA) release of `Azure.Compute.Batch`, the next-generation Azure Batch client library for .NET - Full support for all Batch service operations: pools, jobs, job schedules, tasks, and nodes - Long-running operation support via `WaitUntil` for operations including `DeleteJob`, `DeletePool`, `ResizePool`, `RebootNode`, `ReimageNode`, `StartNode`, `DeallocateNode`, and others - Microsoft Entra ID and Shared Key authentication support ### Other Changes - See the [Migration Guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/MigrationGuide.md) for guidance on migrating from `Microsoft.Azure.Batch` ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets No new snippet regions are required for these fixes. The existing `#region Snippet:` tags in the test sample files are already wired up correctly. ### Step 3: Verify README structure The README already contains all required sections in the correct order: 1. Ō£ģ Getting started (Install the package, Prerequisites, Authenticate the client) 2. Ō£ģ Key concepts 3. Ō£ģ Examples 4. Ō£ģ Troubleshooting 5. Ō£ģ Next steps (needs the text fix above) 6. Ō£ģ Contributing No structural changes are needed beyond the two targeted fixes above. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next. 1. `dotnet build sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 batch` ŌĆö confirm README is updated correctly via `git diff` 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 batch` ŌĆö only needed if any public API was changed (not expected for these doc fixes) 5. `dotnet format sdk/batch/Azure.Compute.Batch/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
items.title: [Batch] Docs: Fix broken NuGet link, malformed Next Steps, and sparse GA changelog in Azure.Compute.Batch README
